sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52988" key="kammati/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμματίδες</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κάπτω</etym>) <sense id="n52988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laurel leaves</tr_> used for supping up <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάμματα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1534.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
